description_long: This is a bronze-colored bust sculpture depicting a middle-aged man wearing glasses, a suit, and a tie. The figure is rendered with realistic facial features, including a gentle smile, neatly combed hair, and detailed clothing folds. The bust is mounted on a rectangular plinth base, which appears to be part of the same material as the sculpture. The back of the bust is smooth and rounded, with some inscription or text faintly visible on the rear of the base. The surface has a slightly glossy finish, suggesting a polished metal or bronze casting. The overall craftsmanship is detailed and lifelike, suitable for commemorative or public display.
description: A detailed bronze-colored bust of a man in glasses and a suit, mounted on a rectangular base with a polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, glasses, suit, and tie with detailed facial features and clothing folds.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the profile of the face, ear, and the depth of the bust's shoulders and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, smooth shoulders, and faint inscription on the base.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the profile of the face, glasses, and the contour of the suit and base.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
